name: Layne Staley
title: Last known photo of Layne Staley, taken on October 31, 1998, at a Halloween concert — his final public appearance.
description: Layne Staley was photographed on October 31, 1998, at a Halloween concert with Alice in Chains at the Spokane Arena — his last public performance. After that night, Staley became increasingly reclusive, retreating to his Seattle condominium where he battled severe heroin and cocaine addiction. His bandmates, friends, and family attempted multiple interventions over the following years, but Staley refused help. On April 19, 2002, his body was found in his apartment. The medical examiner determined he had died on April 5 — coincidentally the same date as Kurt Cobain's death eight years earlier — from a speedball overdose. He weighed just 86 pounds. He was 34 years old.
bio: Layne Staley was the lead vocalist of the rock band Alice in Chains. His haunting voice and deeply personal lyrics made him one of the most distinctive voices of the grunge era.
